checks.name: State Independence
checks.notes: Skill is fully stateless. Context preserved through physical artifacts (DESIGN_DECONSTRUCTION.md, COMPONENT_DRAFT.md, STYLE_LOG.md, INTERACTION_LOG.md, FINAL_COMPONENT.md).

checks.name: Artifact Gating
checks.notes: Sequential gating from SCOUT through INTERACT. Wait-For-Human is mandatory before CRITIC.

checks.name: Intent Preservation
checks.notes: Mandatory 'context' in DESIGN_DECONSTRUCTION.md and 'tradeoffs_rejected' in COMPONENT_DRAFT.md.

checks.name: Loop Breakers
checks.notes: max_retries: 3 in YAML frontmatter. Human-controlled refinement loops prevent autonomous spiraling.

checks.name: Physical Execution Standards
checks.notes: Visual fidelity validated by human inspection via mandatory Wait-For-Human gate.

checks.name: Single-File Format
checks.notes: YAML frontmatter combined with Markdown body in SKILL.md.

checks.name: Composite Personas
checks.notes: Clearly defined: Analyst (Scout), Architect (Scaffold), Stylist (Style), Animator (Interact), Quality Inspector (Critic).

checks.name: Graceful Degradation
checks.notes: Framework-agnostic design. Asks user for framework choice. HITL mandatory for visual work.

checks.name: Separation of Concerns
checks.notes: YAML handles routing logic; Markdown handles cognitive instructions.

checks.name: Agent Agnosticism
checks.notes: No reliance on specific LLM features. Framework choice is user-driven, not hardcoded.
